name: secure-enterprise-messenger
description: Secure internal communication platform with E2EE messaging

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist backend/dist frontend/dist node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules
